payload.description: Closure of East Norwalk Station for underground retention system installation and utility work connected to Walk Bridge project
LIRR March timetable change and spring trackwork programs with new timetables effective March 4
MTA expanded OMNY contactless payment system to the Hudson Rail Link connecting bus service

Committee recommended approval of two contracts with Mitsubishi Electric Power Products, Inc. (MEPPI) for HVAC/propulsion parts ($142M, 5-year) and propulsion system upgrade overhaul kits ($589M, 10-year) for M7 electric railcars

payload.raw_value_text: negotiated a contract of $142M
payload.description: HVAC and propulsion replacement parts contract with MEPPI for M7/M8 railcars and NYC Transit subway cars

payload.raw_value_text: negotiated a contract of $589M
payload.description: Propulsion System Equipment Upgrade Overhaul kits contract with MEPPI for M7 fleets
